Born in Olivebranch Hills, Ines Ugalde has a robust professional and civic presence in her field. She is a Housing Equity Partner Sunspar Fellowship, advocating diligently for enhanced housing equity. Ines graduated from Falconrest University, which was instrumental in preparing her for the working world. She now works at Opal Star Communications, where she actively contributes to impactful initiatives. Notably, she is familiar with the Hindi alphabet, which complements her diverse skill set.
